In my day to day life of a VCF Consultant and SRE I am always dealing with insteresting scenarios and issues.

In my blog I am documenting:

  • VMware Cloud Foundation
  • VMware NSX
  • VMware VKS
  • VMware Tanzu
  • Linux
  • Proxmox
  • Virtualization
  • Cyber Security
  • Exam guides
  • Event blogs
